title: liatris botrys
intro: Liatris botrys, also known as Button Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel insects and relieve respiratory issues due to its volatile oils and sesquiterpene lactones. Liatris botrys has been used to treat a range of health benefits, including colds, coughs, and fever, as well as to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Liatris botrys can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
